stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes what is the block fuel required? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Taxi fuel: 350 kg
Trip fuel: 85 000 kg
Contingency fuel: 5% of the Trip fuel
Final reserve fuel: 3000 kg
Alternate fuel: 5500 kg
Discretionary fuel: 1500 kg
Extra fuel: 0 kg
